name: Invitation Homes Inc.
description: Invitation Homes Inc. is a leading owner and operator of single-family rental homes in the United States. The company is dedicated to providing high-quality homes in desirable neighborhoods, offering residents a premier leasing experience. With a focus on professional property management, Invitation Homes maintains a diverse portfolio of homes across major metropolitan areas, catering to families seeking flexibility, space, and convenience without the commitment of homeownership.
